Package neqsim.process.safety.rupture

Class TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult.Builder

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.rupture.TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult.Builder
Enclosing class:
TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult
static final class TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult.Builder extends Object
Builder used by the study implementation.

  • Method Details

    • geometry

      TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult.Builder geometry(double pipeInternalDiameterM, double inventoryVolumeM3)
      Sets geometry needed for source-term handoff.
      Parameters:
      pipeInternalDiameterM - pipe internal diameter in m
      inventoryVolumeM3 - inventory volume in m3
      Returns:
      this builder

    • addPoint

      TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult.Builder addPoint(double timeS, double pressureBar, double liquidTemperature, double innerWallTemperature, double outerWallTemperature, double stressMpa, double allowableMpa, double flangeRatingBar)
      Adds one time-series point.
      Parameters:
      timeS - time in s
      pressureBar - pressure in bara
      liquidTemperature - temperature in K
      innerWallTemperature - inner wall temperature in K
      outerWallTemperature - outer wall temperature in K
      stressMpa - von Mises stress in MPa
      allowableMpa - allowable stress in MPa
      flangeRatingBar - flange rating in bara
      Returns:
      this builder
